Employment services portal (demo page)

The chat assistant is fixed on the right, like the Maggi pattern: your real site content stays on the left; the Lex Web UI runs only inside the panel. This is a local preview — use the same script + config pattern when you host on CloudFront/S3.

Account & sign-in

Sample card — replace with your app.

Help & support

Use the assistant on the right for claims questions.

Open: /right-panel.html (panel mode) or /index.html (full page).
